name: Telemark (Closed Telemark)
preceding_figure_names: Closed Change, Closed Wing, Double Reverse Spin, Fallaway Reverse And Slip Pivot, Hesitation Change, Reverse Pivot, Reverse Turn, Wing
following_figure_names: Closed Wing, Natural Spin Turn, Natural Turn

steps.action: fwd | FDC | HT | start to turn L | Sway(S) | CBM | rise e/o 1
comments: Use CBM and rise a bit early to lead heel turn.

steps.action: to side | almost BLOD | T | slightly less than 3/8 between 1-2 | Sway(L) | Up
to side and slightly fwd | Pointing DW | TH | slightly over 3/8 between 2-3. body turns less | Sway(S) | Up, lower e/o 3
back | BDC | TH | start to turn L | Sway(S) | CBM | rise slightly e/o 1, NFR
comments: When starting the figure, feel left hip flexor working, do not think about R leg moving back, think about standing on the L leg to get weight moving into the foot.

steps.action: closes to RF (Heel Turn) | LOD | HT | 3/8 between 1-2 | Sway(R) | continue to rise on 2
comments: Heel turn, the feeling is the turn is mostly done on RF, has a slight feeling of pushing off LF, then RF step back on 3 to finish.

steps.action: to side and slightly back | BDW | TH | 3/8 between 2-3, body turns less | Sway(S) | Up, lower e/o 3
comments: Keep head position (which will make it shape to right).
Keep head to right, then on 1 of next e.g Natural Spin Turn, rotate body underneath (no sharp head movement, just keep head at same place starting at 1, not later).
